payload.label: side table
payload.short_description: dark leather side table edge crop
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark glossy black leather padded surface with rounded vertical profile and visible seam stitching; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m) and looks more like an armrest/upholstery piece than a typical hard-sided side table.
